title: koeleria loweana
intro: Koeleria loweana is a species of grass within the family Poaceae, commonly known as a type of Koeleria grass. Traditionally, Koeleria loweana has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Koeleria loweana include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic agent to prevent infections. Koeleria loweana is often prepared as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
